subcodes.title: Words spoken in Feb. 1910
subcodes.first_line: You must be very thankful to God for He brought you to this Holy Land to visit the Blessed Tomb... The Essence of Divinity holds the station of the sun
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @thankfulness; gratitude, @many are called but few are chosen, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
